description_long: This is a large, freestanding fax machine with a robust rectangular body, primarily finished in light gray plastic with darker gray and black accents. The front features a digital control panel with a display screen and several buttons, as well as a prominent paper input slot and three pull-out paper trays below. The left side has an extended output tray system with angled guides for collecting printed documents, while the right side is mostly smooth and unadorned. The rear of the machine displays multiple caution labels and a large vented area, indicating internal electrical components. The overall design is utilitarian, with wheels at the base for mobility and a logo on the front panel.
description: A large, freestanding gray fax machine with a digital control panel, multiple paper trays, and extended output guides. It features a robust, utilitarian design with caution labels and wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: The front view shows the control panel, display screen, paper input slot, three pull-out trays, and a logo on the lower left.
description_view_1: The right side view reveals a smooth, featureless surface with the top output tray slightly visible.
description_view_2: The left side view highlights the extended output tray system and angled guides for collecting documents.
description_view_3: The rear view displays caution labels, a large vented area, and the back of the output trays.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the upper front right, featuring a horizontal layout with a rectangular display screen on the left, a row of buttons to the right, and indicator lights above the buttons.
attribute_paper_tray_design: Three pull-out paper trays are stacked vertically on the lower front, each with a recessed handle and likely adjustable guides, designed for high-capacity paper storage.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the upper left front, with angled black trays extending outward to guide and collect printed or faxed documents.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visibly present or attached to the machine.
